creator: jakob@borg.pp.se
text: When deleting a file on an msdos-partition (about 500 meg in size) the screen went blank, the system rebooted. No panic was written to screen that I could see (was in X) nor to any log. Perhaps relevant to the problem is that the filesystem in question was full (not a byte free) at the time, and still appears full from df even though the file has been removed. I suspect it might need a msdos-fsck to fix it up. The system has an otherwise perfect track record of stability´in many different OSes, and I don't suspect a hardware error.
